## Constitution check

- [ ] Root cause identified (not just symptom patched)
- [ ] No new lint/type/build errors
- [ ] Tests added or test rationale documented
- [ ] No new technical debt without explicit comment
- [ ] Existing behavior preserved unless changed deliberately
